title: labat #3832
definition:
1) to throw down, thrust down, thrust out, thrust away
    1a) (Niphal) to be thrust down, be thrust away, be thrown down,
        be cast aside
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to throw down, thrust down, thrust out, thrust away
    1a) (Niphal) to be thrust down, be thrust away, be thrown down,
        be cast aside

    NASB:  to thrust down, out, or away
